sessionName: Z1 easy 25 min AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
intro: Combined day per week-ahead plan: Wed easy punted to AM, Hyp B pulled forward from Sat to PM (≥6h gap) to clear Sat night for birthday.
Five bumps live on Hyp B today — lat 130→135 (Adj #10), seated calf 315 +10–20 (Adj #4), preacher 50→55/arm (Adj #13), tri pushdown 50→55 (Adj #3), cable lateral (Sat) 15→17.5/side (Adj #11).
Standard run-AM / lift-PM ordering restored vs Tue's off-protocol lift-first (Adj #16).

lift.warmup: Lat pulldown ramp: 90×8, 115×5, 135 working. General: band pull-aparts 2×15, scap pulls 2×8, 1 min hip openers.
lift.cooldown: SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1

cardio.cooldown: 3–5 min walk; daily SI prehab carries through to PM session
